subTitle: Have questions about AlphaPay? Find instant answers to our most frequently asked questions here.

faqs.question: How fast are transfers on AlphaPay?
faqs.answer: Transfers on AlphaPay are instant. Money is sent to the recipient's bank account or mobile wallet in less than 2 seconds, and the service is available 24/7.

faqs.question: Are there any fees for sending money?
faqs.answer: Local transfers within the same country are completely free (zero fees). Cross-border transfers between different African countries use highly competitive mid-market exchange rates with minimal transparent transaction fees shown upfront.

faqs.question: How do I get a Virtual Visa Card?
faqs.answer: You can generate a virtual card directly from your dashboard in less than a minute. You can use it to pay for online shopping, global subscriptions, and international services in USD.

faqs.question: Is AlphaPay secure?
faqs.answer: Yes, AlphaPay is built with bank-grade security. It uses 256-bit SSL encryption, 2FA authentication, and automated real-time fraud detection. It is deployed securely on AWS behind an Application Load Balancer with ACM SSL certificates.

faqs.question: What mobile money networks are supported?
faqs.answer: AlphaPay supports all major mobile money networks across our active countries, including MTN Mobile Money, Telecel/Vodafone Cash, AirtelTigo, M-Pesa, and Orange Money, alongside direct bank account deposits.

faqs.question: Who built AlphaPay?
faqs.answer: AlphaPay was designed and built by Team Alpha as part of the Azubi Africa Internship Programme - Capstone Project 1: End-to-End Cloud Solution Design and Deployment.
